temp_thresholds.note: Standard across all models and cooling types

S19JPro.note: BiXBiT firmware allows profiles from 104-160 TH/s. AMS reports as S19JPro, Antminer S19JPro, or Antminer S19j Pro — all same hardware.

AH3880.profile_note: Supports any custom TH/s value from 300-600. Named profiles are shortcuts.
AH3880.note: Auradine firmware uses named profiles. 'turbo' = 600 TH/s, 'eco' = 300 TH/s. Port 8443 HTTPS API.

S21EXPHyd.note: BiXBiT firmware allows overclock to 506 TH/s. Stock firmware default is 430 TH/s. AMS reports as S21EXPHyd, Antminer S21EXPHyd, or Antminer S21e XP Hyd.

192.168.188.22.note: S21 Immersion unit 1 — in immersion tank port 19

192.168.188.23.note: S21 Immersion unit 2 — in immersion tank port 20

S21Imm.note: Two S21 Imm units with different specs. Each has unique stock/max TH/s. In Fog Hashing B100 immersion tank.
